role: quarterly category demand input
real_company_replacement: quarterly procurement plan or demand forecast
notes: Demand should not be derived from historical contract value by a fixed ratio.

role: estimate supplier allocation capacity when real capacity is unavailable
current_source: scenario assumption based on available supplier data
real_company_replacement: supplier committed capacity / production capacity / approved allocation limit
notes: This is a proxy only and should be replaced by real supplier capacity data in enterprise use.

role: prevent excessive dependence on one supplier
real_company_replacement: company supplier concentration policy or category sourcing rule
notes: Do not hardcode a fixed threshold before policy confirmation.

role: restrict allocation to LIMITED suppliers
real_company_replacement: supplier qualification policy or risk appetite rule
notes: LIMITED suppliers are usable but should not receive unrestricted allocation.

role: ensure at least a minimum number of active suppliers where feasible
real_company_replacement: category sourcing policy or dual-sourcing requirement
notes: If not enough qualified suppliers exist the model should flag a supply coverage gap.

role: cost importance in allocation score
real_company_replacement: management preference or procurement policy
notes: Used only for allocation preference not for M1 qualification.

role: ESG importance in allocation score
real_company_replacement: ESG procurement policy or sustainability target
notes: ESG should remain visible as a separate strategic consideration.

role: risk importance in allocation score
real_company_replacement: enterprise risk appetite or supplier risk policy
notes: Risk should not be hidden; if converted into cost later document the conversion rule.

role: category-level shortlist size for revised Cost-ESG view
real_company_replacement: category sourcing policy or buyer-defined shortlist size
notes: Applied within each category; does not replace legacy M2 ranking outputs.

role: minimum suppliers shortlisted per category where available
real_company_replacement: category manager shortlist policy
notes: Prevents small categories from being excluded by global ranking effects.

role: minimum Cost-ESG views required for stable shortlist flag
real_company_replacement: management preference for shortlist robustness
notes: Uses four revised views: Cost Priority; Balanced Cost-ESG; ESG Priority; Risk-Control View.

role: cost weight in revised Balanced Cost-ESG view
real_company_replacement: category strategy or procurement policy
notes: Cost remains the primary commercial line while ESG is retained as an independent strategic dimension.

role: ESG weight in revised Balanced Cost-ESG view
real_company_replacement: ESG sourcing policy or customer/regulatory target
notes: Used only for shortlist construction; risk lead time and tech remain diagnostics.

role: cost weight in revised Cost Priority view
real_company_replacement: aggressive cost-reduction strategy or buyer price-driven policy
notes: Cost-driven shortlist scenario; ESG is secondary.

role: ESG weight in revised Cost Priority view
real_company_replacement: minimum ESG compliance baseline
notes: ESG retained at minimum threshold for regulatory relevance.

role: cost weight in revised ESG Priority view
real_company_replacement: cost considered but deprioritised
notes: Used to test shortlist sensitivity under high ESG weighting.

role: ESG weight in revised ESG Priority view
real_company_replacement: strong ESG mandate or EU customer requirement
notes: ESG is the primary shortlist driver in this view.

role: minimum Risk_Score to qualify in Risk-Control View
real_company_replacement: enterprise risk appetite threshold
notes: Suppliers below this threshold are excluded from shortlist regardless of Cost-ESG score.

role: Tech_Score threshold for 'Strong capability' flag
real_company_replacement: technology evaluation criteria or supplier capability policy
notes: Diagnostic-only; not a weighted score.

role: Tech_Score threshold for 'Standard capability' flag
real_company_replacement: technology evaluation criteria or supplier capability policy
notes: Below this threshold triggers 'Capability gap'.

role: Cost_Score below this triggers cost disadvantage warning
real_company_replacement: cost competitiveness baseline or category budget threshold
notes: Cost is already in Step 1 shortlist; this is a diagnostic-only flag.

role: ESG_Score below this triggers ESG weakness warning
real_company_replacement: ESG compliance baseline or sustainability policy
notes: ESG weakness appears in key_warning but does not affect shortlist score.

role: Quality diagnostic derived from M1_Risk_Vector not re-scored
real_company_replacement: M1 gate output
notes: Binary flag: 'Quality concern flagged in M1' or 'No quality concern'.

role: Base Cost component weight in Adjusted Cost Index
real_company_replacement: category-specific procurement cost data
notes: Category overrides exist for Critical_Raw (base=0.50 logistics=0.35 carbon=0.15).

role: Logistics/Landed Cost component weight in Adjusted Cost Index
real_company_replacement: category-specific logistics cost data
notes: Default weight used unless category override exists.

role: Carbon Cost component weight in Adjusted Cost Index
real_company_replacement: company carbon pricing or CBAM exposure data
notes: Uniform scaling does not change category-internal rank.

role: Normalization method for cost component values within category
real_company_replacement: confirmed normalization policy
notes: min-max produces [0

role: Adjusted Cost Index above this percentile flagged as costly
real_company_replacement: category cost tolerance policy
notes: Any supplier above this percentile relative within its category.

role: master switch for optional premium cost components
real_company_replacement: management approval to use company-specific premium cost data
notes: Scenario Premium Layer is not part of M1 qualification; enable only after real replacement data is available.

role: Delay Penalty component weight in Adjusted Cost Index
real_company_replacement: category-specific delay cost policy or contract penalty weighting
notes: Default 0 to avoid false precision before delay cost data is confirmed.

role: cost impact assigned to late delivery or lead-time variance
real_company_replacement: contract late-delivery penalty clause or ERP late-delivery cost history
notes: Replacement path should use actual penalty clauses or operational loss records.

role: Risk Premium component weight in Adjusted Cost Index
real_company_replacement: finance or risk-management approved risk premium weighting
notes: Default 0 because risk remains diagnostic unless monetized.

role: mapping from supplier risk level to cost uplift
real_company_replacement: historical disruption loss data insurance premium or finance-approved risk rate
notes: Use only if the company can defend the risk-to-cost conversion.

role: Quality Cost component weight in Adjusted Cost Index
real_company_replacement: category-specific quality cost weighting
notes: Default 0 because M1 quality gate should not be double-counted without cost evidence.

role: cost impact assigned to defects rework rejection or warranty exposure
real_company_replacement: quality cost records scrap rework returns warranty or defect-cost data
notes: Replacement path should use actual quality loss records rather than another qualification score.
